_comment: Interior gaps in Madison's PCT coverage (hitched/jumped/skipped). Edit "status" to "complete" to count a gap as walked; default "unknown" does not count and marks it as still to-do. "remaining" is the stretch from her furthest point to the Canadian terminus (drawn by the incomplete layer, not counted in coverage/pending). Regenerate with scripts/build-gaps.mjs (preserves status/note).

gaps.note: walked variant - a continuous track (walking-pace, no teleport) spans the gap on the actual ground while running off the official PCT line
